text:
Pickpocket (, rom. Pikkupoketto) is a spell card that can be found in the Greed Island game. It allows for a player to steal a random card from the target player's free slots.
__NOTOC__

Summary

This attack spell steals a random card from a target's card binder. It is only capable of stealing a card from the free slots and will not work on the player's designated slots. Since this card steals a completely random card, the card received may be useful or useless. Only works when user is within a close proximity to another player.

Trivia

This card was used on both Gon and Killua in Chapter 133, albeit to no noteworthy effect since they countered it with the "Shuffle Guard" and "Full-Slot Guard" strategies.
